overall.description: A slow aerial drone shot through a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at night, showcasing neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic billboards, and dense urban architecture characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077. The camera glides smoothly along building edges, revealing the sprawling city below with scattered vehicle traffic on the streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude aerial corridor between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting left along the edge of a high-rise building, overlooking the neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: tall dark building with illuminated '05' signage near the top, dominating the right side of the frame
multi-story building with prominent red neon 'FUYUTSUKI ELECTRONICS' signage and teal window lights
raised highway structure connecting buildings in the distance, lined with lights
modern glass building facade with reflective windows and vertical structural lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude aerial view between cyberpunk skyscrapers at night. The camera drifts slowly left along a glass building edge, with a prominent building marked '05' on the right and the Fuyutsuki Electronics building visible ahead. Neon lights illuminate the structures against the dark sky, while an elevated highway stretches across the distant cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cityscape view with emerging street visibility

events.description: large holographic billboard featuring a female character enters the left side of the frame
camera moves past the building with 05 sign, opening up the view to reveal more of the city center

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow leftward aerial drift, revealing new architectural elements and street level below

entered.detail: large vertical holographic advertisement displaying a female character in purple attire
distinctive tall skyscraper with a spire, visible in the distant skyline

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues drifting left, the building with the '05' sign passes out of view, revealing a more open cityscape. A large holographic billboard featuring a female character emerges on the left, while the Fuyutsuki Electronics building shifts toward the left side of the frame. The street level below becomes partially visible, showing sparse vehicle traffic moving along the avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view overlooking multi-lane avenue with active traffic

events.description: street level with vehicle headlights and traffic becomes clearly visible below the camera

agents.ego_description: maintaining slow leftward drift while descending slightly to reveal more street-level detail

notable_agents.action: vehicles moving along the avenue below, visible by their headlights and taillights

entered.detail: multi-lane avenue with visible lane markings and moving vehicle traffic
building with bright neon signage displaying 'CREUAL' or similar text in white letters

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera continues its leftward drift with the large holographic billboard now dominating the left foreground. The Fuyutsuki Electronics building recedes into the left distance while the street level becomes clearly visible below, showing active vehicle traffic on the multi-lane avenue. Additional neon signage on surrounding buildings becomes prominent as the camera reveals more of the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial drift through a neon-lit cyberpunk canyon that gradually opens from a tight corridor of skyscrapers to a wide view of the bustling city streets below. It begins high between towering structures, gliding left along a glass building edge while the Fuyutsuki Electronics building and a structure marked 05 frame the dark night sky. As the camera continues its leftward movement, the initial buildings recede to reveal a sprawling cityscape dominated by a massive holographic billboard of a female character. The perspective then shifts further downward and outward, allowing the street level to emerge from the shadows. Finally, the camera reveals a multi-lane avenue filled with active vehicle traffic and a dense array of glowing neon signage as it expands its view of the urban depths.
